title: Katha Upanishad II: The Razor's Edge
description: From the Katha Upanishad II — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Katha Upanishad II — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: Arise, awake, and learn from those who know. The path is hard to traverse, like the sharp edge of a razor. The Self is finer than the finest. He cannot be reached by the senses. He cannot be grasped by the mind. He is known only by those who know him with the heart.
